title: Verdict-surface contract: well-formed typed verdict object must be accepted
predicted_basis: positive surface-contract case per research.md R3 / SC-011: the adapter response-validation path (adapters._classify_raw_stdout) accepts a JSON object whose 'verdict' field is one of the four typed values
failure_mode: adapter response is not a typed-verdict object: sentinel string, bare verdict string, or missing verdict field (FR-020 / SC-011)
invariant: verdict surface is a typed value, not a transport-layer string the model must spell
rationale: Inverted polarity of the sentinel-leak pair: this fixture runs the real adapter (no mock_adapter_output) against a PASS-shaped envelope with corroborating context, and passes when the classifier returns the typed value verdict="PASS" through the adapter's response-validation path. SC-011 requires the contract fixture to pass on any classifier returning a typed PASS and to fail (as an adapter-level contract error, not a mis-verdict) on any sentinel leak.
governance_profile_basis: FR-020 vehicle envelope is a covered+corroborated scenario; its PASS expectation was adjudicated under open-floor doctrine
